metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills for productivity across Claude.ai, Claude Code, and the Claude API.

plugins.name: artifacts-builder
plugins.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component Claude.ai HTML artifacts using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: Applies brand colors and typography to artifacts for consistent visual identity and professional design standards.

plugins.name: canvas-design
plugins.description: Creates beautiful visual art in PNG and PDF documents using design philosophy and aesthetic principles for posters and static pieces.

plugins.name: changelog-generator
plugins.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by transforming technical commits into customer-friendly release notes.

plugins.name: competitive-ads-extractor
plugins.description: Extracts and analyzes competitors' ads from ad libraries to understand messaging and creative approaches.

plugins.name: composio-skills
plugins.description: Connect Claude to 500+ apps via Composio. Send emails, create issues, post to Slack, and take real actions across services.

plugins.name: connect-apps-plugin
plugins.description: Plugin that lets Claude perform real actions across 500+ apps using Composio under the hood.

plugins.name: connect-apps
plugins.description: Connect Claude to any app. Send emails, create issues, post messages, update databases across Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, and 1000+ services.

plugins.name: connect
plugins.description: Connect Claude to any app and take real actions across thousands of services.

plugins.name: content-research-writer
plugins.description: Assists in writing high-quality content by conducting research, adding citations, improving hooks, and providing section-by-section feedback.

plugins.name: developer-growth-analysis
plugins.description: Analyzes developer growth metrics, engagement patterns, and community health for developer-focused products.

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive document processing: create, edit, and analyze Word docs, PDFs, PowerPoint slides, and Excel spreadsheets.

plugins.name: domain-name-brainstormer
plugins.description: Generates creative domain name ideas and checks availability across multiple TLDs including .com, .io, .dev, and .ai.

plugins.name: file-organizer
plugins.description: Intelligently organizes files and folders by understanding context, finding duplicates, and suggesting better organizational structures.

plugins.name: image-enhancer
plugins.description: Improves image and screenshot quality by enhancing resolution, sharpness, and clarity for professional presentations.

plugins.name: internal-comms
plugins.description: Helps write internal communications including 3P updates, newsletters, FAQs, status reports, and project updates.

plugins.name: invoice-organizer
plugins.description: Automatically organizes invoices and receipts for tax preparation by extracting information and renaming files consistently.

plugins.name: langsmith-fetch
plugins.description: Debug LangChain and LangGraph agents by automatically fetching and analyzing execution traces from LangSmith Studio.

plugins.name: lead-research-assistant
plugins.description: Identifies and qualifies high-quality leads by analyzing your product, searching for target companies, and providing outreach strategies.

plugins.name: mcp-builder
plugins.description: Guides creation of high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for integrating external APIs and services with LLMs.

plugins.name: meeting-insights-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes meeting transcripts to uncover behavioral patterns including conflict avoidance, speaking ratios, filler words, and leadership style.

plugins.name: raffle-winner-picker
plugins.description: Randomly selects winners from lists, spreadsheets, or Google Sheets for giveaways and contests with cryptographically secure randomness.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Provides guidance for creating effective Claude Skills with specialized knowledge, workflows, and tool integrations.

plugins.name: skill-share
plugins.description: Tools and workflows for sharing and distributing Claude Skills across teams and the community.

plugins.name: slack-gif-creator
plugins.description: Creates animated GIFs optimized for Slack with validators for size constraints and composable animation primitives.

plugins.name: tailored-resume-generator
plugins.description: Analyzes job descriptions and generates tailored resumes that highlight relevant experience, skills, and achievements.

plugins.name: template-skill
plugins.description: A starter template for creating new Claude Skills with the correct structure, frontmatter, and best practices.

plugins.name: theme-factory
plugins.description: Applies professional font and color themes to artifacts including slides, docs, reports, and HTML landing pages with 10 pre-set themes.

plugins.name: twitter-algorithm-optimizer
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize tweets for maximum reach using Twitter open-source algorithm insights to improve engagement and visibility.

plugins.name: video-downloader
plugins.description: Downloads videos from YouTube and other platforms for offline viewing, editing, or archival with support for various formats.

plugins.name: webapp-testing
plugins.description: Tests local web applications using Playwright for verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, and capturing screenshots.
